scenario: T2 draft scored at T4 resonance criteria -- artifact failed on voice and resonance dimensions that were premature to evaluate
trigger: Phase mismatch: review applied T4 weights to T2 artifact
action_taken: Re-scored with T2 phase weights (D6 at 50%), artifact passed
failure_mode: Phase mismatch -- applying late-phase criteria to early-phase work kills valid exploration
recovery_tactic: Always read current track from session_state before selecting weight profile

scenario: Copy specialist scored D2 Proof Discipline at 9.0 but artifact contained zero named sources or specific data points
trigger: Score inflation detected on high-weight dimension
action_taken: Rejected score, required re-evaluation with evidence citation rule enforced
failure_mode: Score inflation -- high scores without evidence undermine gate integrity
recovery_tactic: Any dimension scored 8+ must cite specific evidence from the artifact text

scenario: MMA emitted FIX verdict with instruction 'improve the proof section' -- specialist skill could not act on vague guidance
trigger: Vague patch trigger without location, reason, or example
action_taken: Re-emitted with enforced template: what is wrong + where in artifact + how to fix + example of good version
failure_mode: Vague fix instructions waste cycles and cause repeat failures
recovery_tactic: Every patch trigger must follow the 4-part template: wrong/where/how/example

scenario: T4 polish artifact had strong voice and resonance but used false urgency countdown timer with unsubstantiated scarcity claim
trigger: D7 Ethics score 6.5 in T4 (below 7.0 floor)
action_taken: Emitted BLOCK verdict -- non-negotiable ethics floor prevents ship
failure_mode: Ethics violations in polished artifacts are the highest-risk failure mode -- they ship to real humans
recovery_tactic: D7 Ethics has a hard floor of 7.0 in T4. No exceptions, no override.
